name: community namespacing: plugin folder name (e.g. _community/Acme/) is rejected if not kebab-case
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: a
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: foo, name: foo, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/_community/Acme/x.yaml
